prd_metadata.description: Autonomous PRD for ultrawork ralph_loop execution - code-only microservices artifacts without external auth/API gates

requirements: NO manual intervention or clarification needed
Push to GitHub only - no local execution or Azure deployment

electionguard_core2.description: Existing ElectionGuard Core2 capabilities - preserved unchanged as foundational layer

features.name: Modular Arithmetic Engine
features.overview: Implements modular arithmetic over a 4096-bit prime modulus group as specified in ElectionGuard Specification 1.1.0. Provides ElementModP and ElementModQ types with canonical constants (Q = 2^256 - 189, 4096-bit P).
features.business_value: Mathematically verified algebraic foundation for all ElectionGuard cryptographic operations.

functional_requirements.description: ElementModP arithmetic shall operate on a 4096-bit prime modulus group
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: All test vectors pass

functional_requirements.description: ElementModQ arithmetic shall operate with small prime Q = 2^256 - 189
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Operations bounded within 256-bit field

functional_requirements.description: Random element sampling shall use DRBG-backed generation
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Generated elements pass statistical randomness tests

features.name: ElGamal Encryption System
features.overview: ElGamal public-key encryption with key pair generation, ciphertext creation, homomorphic addition, full/partial decryption, and hashed ElGamal for extended data.
features.business_value: Core ballot secrecy guarantee - encrypted selections cannot be decrypted without threshold guardian cooperation.

functional_requirements.description: ElGamal encryption shall produce ciphertexts supporting homomorphic addition
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Sum of N ciphertexts decrypts to sum of N plaintexts

functional_requirements.description: Hashed ElGamal shall protect extended ballot data payloads
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Extended data encrypts/decrypts correctly with no information leakage

features.name: Chaum-Pedersen Zero-Knowledge Proofs
features.overview: Chaum-Pedersen ZK proof system for ballot well-formedness without revealing contents. Supports disjunctive (0 or 1), ranged (count within limits), and constant proofs.
features.business_value: Third-party verification of ballot correctness without plaintext access.

functional_requirements.description: Disjunctive proofs shall verify encrypted selections are 0 or 1
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Valid proofs pass; invalid fail

functional_requirements.description: Ranged proofs shall verify selection counts within limits
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Over-limit ballots rejected

features.name: Hash and HMAC Primitives
features.overview: Domain-separated SHA-256 hashing with spec-aligned hash-prefix constants, HMAC-SHA-256, and DRBG-backed random generation.

functional_requirements.description: SHA-256 shall implement domain separation with spec-aligned prefix constants
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Hash outputs match ElectionGuard Spec 1.1.0 test vectors

features.name: Precomputation Engine
features.overview: Thread-safe precomputation buffer pre-generating cryptographic values (exponentiation results). Singleton pattern with DEFAULT_PRECOMPUTE_SIZE = 5000.
features.business_value: High-throughput ballot encryption by amortising expensive modular exponentiation.

functional_requirements.description: Precomputation buffer shall maintain at least 5000 pre-generated values
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Buffer refills automatically without blocking

functional_requirements.description: Discrete log cache shall support lookup up to 1,000,000
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Cache hit rate exceeds 99%

features.name: Election Manifest Management
features.overview: Election structure definition: contests, candidates, ballot styles, geopolitical units, party info. Deterministic hashing, structural validation, multi-format serialization.

functional_requirements.description: Election manifest shall validate structure and produce deterministic hashes
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Same input produces identical hash; invalid manifests rejected

functional_requirements.description: Manifest serialization shall support JSON, BSON, MsgPack
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Round-trip preserves all fields

features.name: Ballot Lifecycle Management
features.overview: Complete ballot state machine: plaintext -> encrypted -> submitted (cast/spoiled/challenged). Compact representation and manifest-driven reconstruction.

functional_requirements.description: Ballot state machine shall enforce valid transitions
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Invalid transitions throw exceptions; state immutable once set

functional_requirements.description: Compact ballot shall reconstruct full ballot from manifest reference
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Byte-for-byte match

features.name: Encryption Workflow Orchestration
features.overview: Complete ballot encryption pipeline via EncryptionDevice (stateful metadata) and EncryptionMediator (orchestration). Handles normalization, extended-data encoding, precompute-buffer consumption.

functional_requirements.description: EncryptionMediator shall orchestrate complete ballot encryption with all proofs
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Every encrypted ballot passes Chaum-Pedersen verification

functional_requirements.description: Ballot code chaining shall produce sequential verifiable codes
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Each code derivable from predecessor

functional_requirements.description: System shall support up to 1,000,000 encrypted ballots
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: No memory exhaustion or performance degradation

features.name: Cross-Language Binding Layer
features.overview: Interoperability surfaces for C, .NET, TypeScript, WebAssembly. C ABI facades (19 files) with opaque eg_* handles. .NET Standard bindings (netstandard2.0, net10.0). TypeScript/WASM npm package.

features.name: MongoDB Persistence Layer
features.overview: Database persistence using MongoDB 6.0.3 via Docker Compose. Collections: key_ceremonies, elections, ballots, tallies with polymorphic DataType indexes.

features.name: CLI Tooling
features.overview: .NET 10 global tool for creating election artifacts, encrypting ballots, generating synthetic test ballots, verification operations.

features.name: Cross-Platform Build System
features.overview: CMake 3.14+ with CPM 0.31.0, GNU Make workflow automation, GitHub Actions CI/CD. Platforms: Linux, macOS, Windows, Android, iOS, WebAssembly.

vspace_anonymous_credentials.description: vSPACE Anonymous Credential Authentication Layer - autonomous cryptographic implementations

features.name: SAAC Protocol Implementation
features.overview: Server-Aided Anonymous Credentials protocol (ePrint 2025/513, CRYPTO 2025). Oblivious issuance and publicly verifiable, multi-show anonymous credentials on pairing-free NIST P-256/P-384 curves.
features.business_value: Voter authentication that is unlinkable - no correlation between authentication event and encrypted ballot.
features.user_benefits: Voters prove eligibility without revealing identity, preserving ballot secrecy.

functional_requirements.description: SAAC issuance shall be oblivious - issuer cannot link issuance to presentation
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: No statistical correlation under DDH assumption

functional_requirements.description: SAAC presentation shall produce publicly verifiable proofs on NIST P-256
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Proofs verify with issuer public parameters only

functional_requirements.description: SAAC auxiliary information generation shall be anonymous
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Aux info indistinguishable between eligible voters

functional_requirements.description: C++ implementation shall produce bit-identical outputs to Python reference
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Byte-level comparison passes for all test vectors

features.name: Multi-Holder BBS Credentials
features.overview: Multi-Holder Anonymous Credentials from BBS Signatures (ePrint 2024/1874, CRYPTO 2025). Credential shares distributed across multiple devices. Threshold presentation prevents single-point-of-compromise identity theft.
features.business_value: Credential-theft resistance - no single compromised device can impersonate voter.

technical_context.credential_bridge: BBS multi-holder shares -> SAAC presentation without materialising full BBS credential

functional_requirements.description: Credential splitting shall distribute shares across configurable holder devices
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Share reconstruction produces valid credential with any t-of-n threshold

functional_requirements.description: Threshold presentation shall require cooperation from configured device count
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Presentation fails with fewer than threshold; succeeds with threshold

functional_requirements.description: Credential re-derivation bridge shall convert BBS shares to SAAC without materialising full BBS credential
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: No single device holds complete BBS credential during re-derivation

features.name: Credential-to-Ballot Binding
features.overview: Cryptographic binding of anonymous credential presentation to ElectionGuard ballot encryption. Pedersen commitment C = g^r * h^s where r is ballot nonce and s is credential serial number. Zero-knowledge proof demonstrates commitment links both without revealing either.
features.business_value: Three simultaneous properties: ballot stuffing prevention, unlinkability, ballot secrecy preservation.

functional_requirements.description: Pedersen commitment shall correctly bind ballot nonce r to credential serial s
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Commitment C = g^r * h^s verifiable with published generators and proof

functional_requirements.description: Zero-knowledge binding proof shall demonstrate commitment links both ballot and credential without revealing either
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Proof passes verification; extraction computationally infeasible

functional_requirements.description: Binding layer shall wrap electionguard.encrypt without modifying internals
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: All standard ElectionGuard proofs remain valid; binding additive only

features.name: One-Show Enforcement
features.overview: Mechanism ensuring each voter casts at most one ballot per election. VRF evaluated on election identifier under credential-derived key produces deterministic but unlinkable serial number.

technical_context.serial_derivation: VRF on election ID with credential-derived key
technical_context.verification: Anyone can verify no serial appears twice

functional_requirements.description: VRF serial derivation shall be deterministic given credential and election ID
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Same credential + election ID produces same serial

functional_requirements.description: Serial uniqueness check shall reject any ballot with duplicate serial
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Duplicate serials detected; second ballot rejected prior to casting

functional_requirements.description: Serial shall be unlinkable to voter identity
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: No voter credential/identity info derivable from published serial

vspace_verification.description: vSPACE Verification and Audit Layer - autonomous verification implementations

features.name: Augmented Election Record
features.overview: Extends standard ElectionGuard JSON election record with vspace_record section: issuer public parameters, one-show serial numbers, binding commitments, binding proofs, SAAC auxiliary information. Backward compatible - standard verifiers ignore vspace_record.

functional_requirements.description: Augmented record shall include vspace_record section with all vSPACE artifacts
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Record contains issuer params, all serials, all commitments, all proofs, SAAC aux info

functional_requirements.description: Standard ElectionGuard verifiers shall process augmented record without error
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Existing electionguard-verifier produces valid result on augmented records

features.name: vSPACE Verifier Extension
features.overview: Rust crate vspace-verify extending electionguard-verifier with SAAC presentation validity checks, one-show serial uniqueness verification, and binding proof correctness.

checks: Serial number uniqueness across all cast ballots
Binding proof linking commitment to ballot and credential
technical_context.usage: Standalone or integrated with existing Rust verifier pipeline

functional_requirements.description: vSPACE verifier shall validate SAAC presentation proofs for all cast ballots
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: All valid presentations pass; invalid causes failure

functional_requirements.description: vSPACE verifier shall detect duplicate one-show serial numbers
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Duplicate serials cause verification failure with descriptive error

functional_requirements.description: vSPACE verifier shall validate binding proofs
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Valid proofs pass; tampered commitments/mismatched bindings cause failure

vspace_advanced.description: vSPACE Advanced Extensions - autonomous networking and dynamic guardians

features.name: FDVSS-1 Dynamic Guardians
features.overview: Optional extension of guardian key ceremony with Fully Dynamic Verifiable Secret Sharing. Allows guardians to join/leave committee without re-keying. FDPSS redistribution enables single-round guardian rotation.

security_properties.redistribution: FDPSS protocol bound to tally accumulation

functional_requirements.description: FDVSS-1 shall generate guardian key shares with information-theoretic security
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Share reconstruction with t-of-n threshold recovers election private key

functional_requirements.description: FDPSS redistribution shall transfer compromised guardian share to replacement in single round
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Redistribution completes without revealing election private key

features.notes: Based on withdrawn manuscript; carries academic risk; optional feature flag mitigates

features.name: Authenticated Networking Layer
features.overview: TLS 1.3 mutual authentication for all guardian communication. Certificate pinning, election-specific CA, DoS-resistant gossip protocol (Bracha's reliable broadcast, O(n log n) complexity), UC Framework verification.

functional_requirements.description: All guardian communication shall use mutually authenticated TLS 1.3
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Connections without valid mutual certificates rejected; certificate pinning enforced

functional_requirements.description: Broadcast channel shall tolerate t < n/3 Byzantine faults
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Consensus reached with up to floor((n-1)/3) faulty guardians

phases.gate_conditions: All SAAC, Multi-Holder, and binding unit tests pass. 10-voter, 3-guardian, 2-of-3 threshold simulation produces verifiable augmented election record.
C++ bit-identical to Python. Credential verification < 50 ms. Rust verifier validates all records. Docker health < 60 s.

constraints.constraint: No modification to any existing ElectionGuard module, parameter, or API
All vSPACE features must be additive
constraints.rationale: Existing verifiers must work without modification

constraints.constraint: Pre-release status - not for production elections
constraints.rationale: Repository README explicitly states this limitation
